description: An useraccount represents an user for the ZMS. It contains the rights the user has for processing data with the ZMS. Usually a user creates a workstation entity if he/she begins with the work.

id.description: loginname, the unique identifier. Used as id to enable fetching

messages.minLength: Bitte tragen Sie hier die LDAP-Kennung ein (erster Teil der E-Mail-Adresse)
messages.maxLength: Der Nutzername sollte 40 Zeichen nicht überschreiten
messages.pattern: Der Nutzername darf nur Kleinbuchstaben, Zahlen, Punkte, Unterstriche und Bindestriche enthalten

messages.minLength: Es kann eine E-Mail-Adresse angegeben werden.
messages.pattern: Die E-Mail Adresse muss eine valide E-Mail im Format max@mustermann.de sein.

password.description: this field is only used on changing the password and login

messages.minLength: Die Länge des Passwortes muss mindestens 6 Zeichen betragen.
messages.maxLength: Die Länge des Passwortes darf maximal 60 Zeichen betragen.

messages.minLength: Die Länge des Passwortes muss mindestens 6 Zeichen betragen.
messages.maxLength: Die Länge des Passwortes darf maximal 40 Zeichen betragen.

changePassword.description: this field is only used on changing the password

messages.format: Die Passwortwiederholung muss identisch zum Passwort sein.

appointment.description: Access clerk view and manage appointments (create, edit, reschedule, cancel, including sending notification emails)

availability.description: Create, update, and delete opening hours, including blocking times and exceptions

calldisplay.description: Configure and customize call display layouts

capacityreport.description: View and export planned/booked capacity statistics

cherrypick.description: Directly call appointments from the queue (requires queue access)

counter.description: Access counter view including weekly and monthly calendar

customersearch.description: Search for customers and view upcoming appointments (excluding past appointments)

finishedqueuepast.description: View completed appointments from the past

openqueue.description: View open calls in the queue

organisation.description: Create, update, and delete organizational units

restrictedscope.description: Read location configuration and modify restricted sections

source.description: Manage tenants including service providers and services

useraccount.description: Create, update, delete, and search user accounts

superuser.description: Full access to all system features

roles.description: List of role names assigned to the useraccount (e.g. agent_queue, appointment_admin, system_admin).
